code_script:
# VF language (.vf)
# Scene
GROUND_SIZE 1000
GROUND_COLOR #606060
SKY_COLOR #1A2230

# Define reusable class defaults
CLASS Crate type=box width=80 depth=80 height=80 color=#43B5FF
NEW crateA class=Crate tx=0 ty=0 tz=40
APPLY crateA target=primary

# Add more modules with custom overrides
NEW ballA type=sphere radius=28 segments=26 rings=18 color=#F26F4C tx=130 tz=28
APPLY ballA target=add

# Multi-face image module (4 side faces + top/bottom)
FACEMODULE cubeA faces=4 radius=45 height=70 front=https://example.com/front.png right=https://example.com/right.png back=https://example.com/back.png left=https://example.com/left.png top=https://example.com/top.png bottom=https://example.com/bottom.png target=add

# URL validation + media assets
URLCHECK https://example.com/picture.png type=image
PICTURE poster https://example.com/picture.png mode=asset
AUDIO theme https://example.com/theme.mp3 volume=80 loop=true
VIDEO intro https://example.com/intro.mp4 volume=60

# Timeline example
AT 0
ROTATE axes=XY speed=40 duration=10
WAIT 5
SETCOLOR color=#FF3030 mode=Solid
